[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101100 3
1 111010011 6
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 010000100 2
5 001111000 4
6 001100101 4
7 000000110 2

01 10 000000000 a match 2 3
12 21 001100000 2
23 32 000000100 1
34 43 000000110 2 match 7
45 54 000000010 1
56 65 000000000 a match 2 3
67 76 000000000 a match 2 3
70 07 010000000 1

02 20 000000100 1
13 31 000000000 a match 2 3
24 42 001000100 2
35 53 000000010 1
46 64 000000100 1
57 75 000000011 2
60 06 000000100 1
71 17 001010000 2

03 30 000000100 1
14 41 001010000 2
25 52 000000001 1
36 63 000000100 1
47 74 111010010 5
50 05 000000000 a match 2 3
61 16 000101000 2
72 27 001000001 2

04 40 010000100 2 match 4
15 51 000000000 a match 2 3
26 62 000100100 2
37 73 000000010 1
[completion]
0 absent
1 absent
2 01 10 56 65 67 76 13 31 50 05 15 51

none
